m := 4;
n := 9;
g := 97;
F<i>:=CyclotomicField(4);
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(F,2);

6)*u^18 + (-i - 5)*u^17 + (36*i - 5)*u^16 - 4*u^15 + (2*i - 4)*u^14 + (2*i - 3)*u^13 + (i - 3)*u^12 + (i - 2)*u^11 - 2*u^10 - u^9 - u^8)*v + i*u^21 - u^18 - i*u^15;
q := (u*v-u-v-1)/(u*v+u-v-1);
t := -(u*v-u-v-1)/(u*v+u+v+1);
E := [R!1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
